question: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
answer: Based on the function call, the likely root cause class for the sudden hydrogen increase in transformer T-018 is Arc Discharge. The recommended confirmatory measurement is to check the Acetylene (C2H2) gas levels.

output.name: Arc Discharge
output.description: High-energy arcing causing severe oil decomposition. Very high C2H2 and H2.

history.content: Based on the function call, the likely root cause class for the sudden hydrogen increase in transformer T-018 is Arc Discharge. The recommended confirmatory measurement is to check the Acetylene (C2H2) gas levels.

scenario.text: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
